channel.title: IPSec on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in IPSec on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Communication and Network Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Network Security" , "Secure Architecture" , "Segmentation" , "Wireless Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "SDN" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Communication and Network Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure network architecture, segmentation, wireless and cellular networks, modern network concepts, and secure channels.

item.title: Networking Basics: What is an IP Address & IPv4 vs IPv6
item.category: "Networking" , "IP Addresses" , "Internet Protocols" , "IPv4" , "IPv6" , "Network Communication" , "Internet Connectivity" , "Technology" , "Network Infrastructure" , "Internet Security"
item.description: Discover the basics of IP addresses, including the difference between IPv4 and IPv6, their significance, and the importance of IPv6 adoption.
